node.text: â¨Aap incoming call aur OTP miss kar rahe hain! Abhi recharge karein Rs349 se aur payein unlimited call, UL 5G data + 2GB/din, 20+ OTT jese SonyLIV, Chaupal Airtel Xstream Play Premium ke saath, 28 din aur Apple music, 6 mahine tak. Recharge on Airtel Thanks App with ZERO CONVENIENCE FEE i.airtel.inâ©

â¨Aap incoming call aur OTP miss kar rahe hain! Abhi recharge karein Rs299 ke Airtel pack se aur payein Airtel Xstream Play Premium, UL call, 1.5GB data/din aur 100 SMS/din, 28 din tak. Recharge on Airtel Thanks App with ZERO CONVENIENCE FEE i.airtel.in/AirRechâ©

â¨Aap incoming call aur OTP miss kar rahe hain! Abhi recharge karein Rs199 se aur payein UL call, 2GB data aur 100 SMS/din, 28 din tak. Recharge on Airtel Thanks App with ZERO CONVENIENCE FEE i.airtel.in/AirRechâ©
â¨ Airtel services on 8228939625 are inactive as your recharge is due. To restart, recharge NOW with an unlimited pack i.airtel.in/FDPNew Ignore if rechargedâ©
â¨FLAT 50% OFF with BATA EOSS! Last 3 days left - avail assured big Savings. Shop what you love till 26 Jan @ store or rebrand.ly/vtlr3i3 T&Câ©
